name: Date everything (men) [UPDATED]
description:
This bot contains most of the male characters in the game 'date everything' masculine non binary characters were not included. Only a few men are missing from this bot (it was alot of writing :( )

I tried my best to keep things as accurate as I could but somethings will still probably be a bit wrong.

This bot doesnt follow the original opening to the game , instead you are one of the object in the house
